steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The passage emphasizes the mosque's massive scale—it accommodates approximately 17,000 people. The blank requires a word describing the visual impression created by such size.

steps.title: Match the word to the visual effect
steps.content:
The mosque needs to mean something that conveys the overwhelming impression of its massive scale. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — idealized: perfected or made to seem flawless — the passage says nothing about perfection, only size. ✗
  • Choice B — intricate: having many complex details — size, not complexity, is the emphasis. ✗
  • Choice C — illusory: based on illusion or deception — the mosque is real and enormous, not an illusion. ✗
  • Choice D — imposing: commanding and impressive in appearance due to sheer scale — exactly what a structure housing 17,000 people would be. ✓
That confirms D is correct.
